creator: empty.japan
caption:
I cannot believe that I have been living in Nagano for 3 months and only just made it to this amazing place.

📍Togakushi Shrine Okusha Zuishinmon 戸隠神社 奥社 随神門

This place is filled with legends, and to me, it’s definitely one of the most beautiful spots in all of Japan. It is essentially a beautiful path through a forest, leading to a shrine at the end. The walk to the shrine takes about 30 to 40 minutes, and since the trail can be uneven, wearing comfy shoes is advisable. I especially recommend visiting this place if you want to get away from the summer heat.

Wanna see the winter edition of this place, all covered in snow? I definitely know what video I will post as soon as there is some fresh snow!
